name: vite-plugin-reactivity-graph
description: Dev-only Vite plugin that visualizes Vue reactivity (ref/reactive/computed/watch/watchEffect + render effects) as a live, glowing dependency graph — static map + runtime traffic.

scripts.analyze: npm run build && node dist/static/cli.js src/App.vue
scripts.test: node test/tracer.test.mjs && node test/static.test.mjs && node test/plugin.test.mjs && node test/scale_cycle.test.mjs && node test/computed_setter.test.mjs && node test/external.test.mjs && node test/transform.test.mjs && node test/deep_writes.test.mjs && node test/component_render.test.mjs && node test/cross_component.test.mjs && node test/e2e_vite.test.mjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
